sqlMap.select: select sc.id, to_char(sc.invoke_time,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') time, sc.form_app_id formid,de.name name from wf_supernode_control sc LEFT JOIN WF_SUPERNODE_CONTROL_DETAIL scson on SC.ID=SCSON.CONTROL_ID left join form_definition de on de.id =sc.form_app_id where process_id = (select process_id from col_summary where id = #summaryid#) and scson.data_id like chr(60)||'data%' and xmltype(nvl(scson.data_id,chr(60)||'data/'||chr(62))).extract('/data/init/nodecode/text()').getStringVal() in ($dataid$) order by time asc
select path from org_unit where id in ($depart$)
select id from org_unit where path like '$path$%' and org_unit.is_enable = 1 and org_unit.is_internal = 1
select id from org_member where is_enable = 1 and org_department_id in ($deptids$)
select login_name from org_principal where member_id in ($memberid$)

select formName as "formName", tableName as "tableName", templateNo as "templateNo", token as "token", flowId as "flowId" from vm_blockAndActiveInfo where isOpen != #isOpen# and blockType = #blockType#
select templateNo as "templateNo", activeConditions as "activeConditions" from vm_blockAndActiveConfig
